'''zabocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalemail|scalemail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalemail|scalemail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zabocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæbecheth|zæbecheth]] || [[word:zæbechej|zæbechej]] || [[word:zæbechesh|zæbechesh]] || [[word:zæbeche|zæbeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zabobochoth|zabobochoth]] || [[word:zabobochoj|zabobochoj]] || [[word:zabobochosh|zabobochosh]] || [[word:zabobocho|zabobocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zabochoth|zabochoth]] || [[word:zabochoj|zabochoj]] || [[word:zabochosh|zabochosh]] || [[word:zabocho|zabocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zabofchoth|zabofchoth]] || [[word:zabofchoj|zabofchoj]] || [[word:zabofchosh|zabofchosh]] || [[word:zabofchof|zabofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zabochotho|zabochotho]] || [[word:zabochojo|zabochojo]] || [[word:zabochosho|zabochosho]] || [[word:zabochoko|zabochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zabochoth|zabochoth]] || [[word:zabochoj|zabochoj]] || [[word:zabochosh|zabochosh]] || [[word:zabocho|zabocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zabochothol|zabochothol]] || [[word:zabochojol|zabochojol]] || [[word:zabochoshol|zabochoshol]] || [[word:zabochokol|zabochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zabochothotho|zabochothotho]] || [[word:zabochojojo|zabochojojo]] || [[word:zabochoshosho|zabochoshosho]] || [[word:zabochoko|zabochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zabochothon|zabochothon]] || [[word:zabochojon|zabochojon]] || [[word:zabochoshon|zabochoshon]] || [[word:zabochokon|zabochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zabochothoro|zabochothoro]] || [[word:zabochojoro|zabochojoro]] || [[word:zabochoshoro|zabochoshoro]] || [[word:zabochokoro|zabochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
